creator: vincent.jancso@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #14)

Did you manage to look into adding the same patch for PHP 8.2 and 8.3? Unfortunately I am also affected by this issue and had to revert the last commit as a workaround. Switching to php-fpm is being evaluated but not yet ready (as we have a pretty big infrastructure), so an option to switch back to the bundled pcre would be nice.
